flags.concern: Repository targeting: the plan is aimed at a different checkout than the stated repository, so following it literally will not implement this feature here.
flags.evidence: Retargeted plan from skill directory to actual source at `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan/`. Added Step 3 to modify `_ensure_verification_task()` in `handlers.py` — the primary root cause of scope creep (FLAG-002). Addressed the artifact model gap (FLAG-003) by having the review agent re-run tests and compare against baseline rather than requiring a new post-execution test schema in `execution.json`. Reordered steps to prioritize the verification task fix as the highest-impact change.
